title: Tender Russian Rice Pilaf
description: A soothing, sweet, and fluffy rice dish perfect for a sick day, infused with the flavors of seasoned rice vinegar and a dash of comfort.

ingredients.name: uncooked white jasmine rice
ingredients.notes: short-grain rice is best for this dish

ingredients.name: vegetable oil
ingredients.notes: use a neutral oil for best flavor

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the grated carrot and sliced green beans, and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the vegetables are slightly tender.
Add the uncooked rice and stir to combine with the vegetables.
Add the seasoned rice vinegar, chicken broth, water, salt, black pepper, and dried parsley.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover the saucepan with a tight-fitting lid, and simmer for 18-20 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it sit, covered, for 5 minutes.
Fluff the rice pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
